questionHtml: Hunting of M. gallopavo is currently regulated. Predict what would happen if the hunting regulations were removed.
markschemeHtml:
a. population would decrease/may become extinct

b. open realized niche for other organisms

    OWTTE

c. food web may change

d. less intraspecific competition

[Max 2 Marks]
